message.content:
@startuml
title ShoppingCart

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

class ShoppingCart <<entity>> {
  /SubTotal : Currency
  /TaxAmount : Currency
  /DiscountAmount : Currency
  /TotalAmount : Currency
}

class ProductOnCart <<entity>> {
  /Price : Currency
  Quantity : Integer
  /Total : Currency
}

class Customer
class Product

ShoppingCart "1..1 ShoppingCart" --> "0..* ProductsOnCart" ProductOnCart
ProductOnCart "0..*" --> "1..1 Product" Product
ShoppingCart "0..*" --> "1..1 Customer" Customer
@enduml
